_meta.description: SYNC IAM realistic synthetic user seed data. Names/emails/phones are generated to look Vietnamese/realistic for development but are not claimed to belong to real people.
dataQualityRules: SubscriptionTier only uses Free/Premium/Ultra from code.
UserAchievement is assigned only when gamification data satisfies the Achievement.RequirementJson threshold.
